aesthetics: Warm, creative, slightly imperfect. Focus on a tactile, 'art school' sketchbook feel with high-end editorial typography.

rules.headings: font-bold or font-black, tracking-tight, leading-none. Large sizes for emotional impact.

grids_and_layouts.structure: 12-column Bento-inspired split. Mobile-first (1 col), tablet/desktop (12 cols).
grids_and_layouts.sidebar_left: col-span-full md:col-span-4. Acts as the control panel. Fixed or sticky height `h-screen` on desktop with internal scrolling. Generous padding `p-8`. Right border 1px solid `border_subtle`.
grids_and_layouts.main_panel: col-span-full md:col-span-8. Scrollable 7-day timeline. Spacing `gap-8`, padding `p-8` or `p-12`.
grids_and_layouts.bottom_section: col-span-full. Distinct background (`background_secondary`) to separate lead capture from the app flow. Massive padding `py-20` to signal a new context.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards_timeline: Flat white background (`#FFFFFF`) with 1px subtle border (`border-[#E7E5DF]`). NO heavy drop shadows. Hover: Slight lift (`-translate-y-1`), subtle ambient shadow, border color darkens slightly.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.buttons_primary: Pill-shaped or rounded-lg. Solid terracotta (`bg-[#C8553D]`) with white text. Micro-interaction: `active:scale-95 transition-transform hover:bg-[#A64530]`.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs_and_forms: 1px solid border, `bg-white`. Focus state: `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C8553D]/30 focus:border-[#C8553D]`. Use Shadcn components heavily customized to remove the 'Vercel default' look.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.empty_state: Central aligned, warm abstract art image, playful but elegant text. Use soft opacity.

motion.timeline_entrance: Staggered fade-up for each day card in the 7-day schedule.
motion.loading_state: Pulsing skeleton for AI generation. Use a warm terracotta-to-cream shimmer instead of standard gray `animate-pulse`.
motion.hover_effects: All interactive elements must have a transition (`transition-all duration-300 ease-out`).

components.inputs: Shadcn form components. Dropdown/Select must use Shadcn Select. Slider must use Shadcn Slider. Customize padding and border colors to match earthy theme.
components.timeline_day: A custom card component per day. Should feature a vertical connecting line/node visual on the left. Content includes 'Suggest Time', 'Caption', 'Hashtags', and 'Copy' button. Use 'lucide-react' for icons.

empty_state_image.description: Abstract painting with geometric shapes and muted colors. Display elegantly in the Main Panel when no campaign is generated.

header_accent_image.description: Dynamic abstract expressionism artwork featuring bold red and orange acrylic strokes. Can be used as a subtle, low-opacity background texture or banner accent.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over terracotta is pure white. Muted text should be `#57534E` on cream to meet 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: MUST include `data-testid` on ALL interactive elements (inputs, buttons, select, slider, day-cards, copy-buttons, lead-capture-form). Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette to achieve the 'warm, creative, slightly imperfect' aesthetic requested by the user.
Do not use generic gray or blue defaults. Everything must feel like an art studio planner.
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for layout. Use Shadcn for the Slider, Select, DatePicker, and Form elements.
For the timeline, use a vertical connecting line with nodes/dots on the left, and the content cards on the right. Give the cards a subtle tactile border and soft hover effect.

The AI loading state should be visually pleasing. Instead of standard gray bars, use a skeleton with `bg-[#F5F2EA]` and an `after:` element with a sweeping `bg-gradient-to-r` from transparent to `#E7E5DF` to transparent.
Include 'lucide-react' icons for the Copy buttons, Calendar, Sliders, etc.
Add functional localStorage logic to save the lead capture form data.
Use Framer Motion or native CSS transitions for the timeline staggered entrance.
Do not center-align the app container. Align text to the left for readability, using the grid layout for structure.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, custom cursors, selection states separate good from extraordinary.
MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
MUST NOT center align the app container in CSS.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui. Create new ones matching existing patterns.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
